project: Local LLM Server + OpenClaw + Copilot Coordination

tasks.title: Install Node.js LTS + npm
tasks.description: Install Node.js LTS and npm on the server. Needed for OpenClaw.
tasks.result: Node.js v24.14.0 + npm 11.9.0 installed.

tasks.title: Install GitHub CLI + auth
tasks.description: Install gh CLI and authenticate. Needed for repo management. (Skippable — PAT-based git push already working.)
tasks.result: Not needed — using fine-grained PAT for git push.

tasks.title: Create collab git repo
tasks.description: Create ~/collab/ dir, init git, create private GitHub repo PeerDiego/llm-collab, push.
tasks.result: Repo live at github.com/PeerDiego/llm-collab. PAT-based auth configured.

tasks.title: Cron: auto-sync collab repo
tasks.description: Cron job every 5 min — only commits+pushes if there are changes.
tasks.result: auto-sync.sh running via cron every 5 min. Dirty-check via git status --porcelain.

tasks.title: Install Ollama
tasks.description: Install Ollama for CPU-only LLM inference on this server.
tasks.result: Ollama installed, systemd enabled, CPU-only mode.

tasks.title: Pull LLM model
tasks.description: Pull a suitable quantized model (e.g., llama3.1:8b or qwen2.5-coder:7b) via Ollama.
tasks.result: llama3.1:8b pulled successfully.

tasks.title: Verify Ollama works
tasks.description: Test that Ollama is serving and responding to inference requests.
tasks.result: Ollama responding at localhost:11434. Tested inference OK.

tasks.title: Ollama systemd service
tasks.description: Ensure Ollama starts on boot via systemd.
tasks.result: Ollama systemd service enabled and running on boot.

tasks.title: Build MCP coordination server
tasks.description: Python MCP server with tools: get_plan, claim_task, complete_task, add_task, post_message, get_messages. Stores state in ~/collab/plan.json and messages.json.
tasks.result: MCP coordination server built (server.py). Tools: get_plan, get_my_tasks, claim_task, complete_task, add_task, block_task, post_message, get_messages.

tasks.title: Configure MCP for LLMCo
tasks.description: Add MCP server config to LLMCo's Copilot CLI so coordination tools are available.
tasks.result: MCP config added to ~/.copilot/mcp.json. Will take effect on next Copilot CLI restart.

tasks.title: Test MCP tools
tasks.description: Verify MCP tools work from LLMCo's Copilot CLI.
tasks.result: MCP server responds correctly to initialize + reads plan.json.

tasks.title: Install OpenClaw on server
tasks.description: Install OpenClaw via npm on this server.
tasks.result: OpenClaw 2026.3.13 installed globally via npm.

tasks.title: Configure OpenClaw for Ollama
tasks.description: Configure OpenClaw to use local Ollama at localhost:11434.
tasks.result: OpenClaw configured with ollama/llama3.1:8b as primary model. Config at ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json, env at ~/.openclaw/.env.

tasks.title: Write laptop setup instructions
tasks.description: Comprehensive instructions for LapCo: SSH tunnels, OpenClaw install+config, MCP connection, verification steps. Save to ~/collab/laptop-setup.md.
tasks.result: laptop-setup.md written with Linux/macOS + Windows instructions, MCP setup, and verification steps.

tasks.title: Configure SSH tunnel (Linux)
tasks.description: Set up an SSH tunnel from the Linux client to the LLM server to forward Ollama (port 11434). Run: ssh -N -L 11434:localhost:11434 <user>@<server> (add -f to background). Verify with: curl http://localhost:11434/api/tags
tasks.result: SSH tunnel established: ssh -p 45554 -f -N -L 11434:localhost:11434 claw@mw-016.myworkspace.microsoft.com. Verified: curl localhost:11434/api/tags shows phi3:medium, qwen2.5-coder:7b, llama3.1:8b.

tasks.title: Install + configure OpenClaw (Linux)
tasks.description: Install OpenClaw on the Linux client: npm install -g openclaw@latest. Create ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json with primary model ollama/llama3.1:8b. Create ~/.openclaw/.env with OLLAMA_API_KEY=ollama-local. Verify: openclaw config validate && openclaw models status.
tasks.result: OpenClaw 2026.3.13 installed globally via npm (Node 22.22.1). Config at ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json with ollama/llama3.1:8b as primary model. Auth detected from env.

tasks.title: Set up MCP coordination server (Linux)
tasks.description: Install Python venv + mcp package: cd ~/collab && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install mcp. Configure ~/.copilot/mcp.json with command pointing to ~/collab/.venv/bin/python3 and args [~/collab/server.py]. Restart Copilot CLI to activate. Verify with get_plan() tool.
tasks.result: Python venv created at ~/collab/.venv, mcp package installed, ~/.copilot/mcp.json configured with collab-coordinator pointing to server.py. MCP server tested and responding.

tasks.title: Verify full setup (Linux)
tasks.description: Verify the complete setup: 1) SSH tunnel active (curl localhost:11434/api/tags). 2) OpenClaw configured (openclaw models status shows ollama). 3) MCP tools available (get_plan returns task board). Mark done only when all three checks pass.
tasks.result: All 3 checks pass: 1) SSH tunnel active — 3 models visible (llama3.1:8b, qwen2.5-coder:7b, phi3:medium). 2) OpenClaw 2026.3.13 configured with ollama/llama3.1:8b. 3) MCP tools responding correctly.

tasks.title: Configure OpenClaw as persistent message-checking agent
tasks.description: Set up OpenClaw on the server with a heartbeat that periodically checks messages.json for unread messages addressed to claw-machine and responds. This gives the server-side agent presence even when no Copilot CLI session is active.
tasks.notes: Deferred for future implementation. OpenClaw and Ollama are already installed — this is a configuration task, not a build task.

tasks.title: Implement retract_message MCP tool
tasks.description: Add message retraction support to the MCP coordination server. Changes required: (1) Add auto-generated 8-char hex ID field to all messages in post_message. (2) New tool: retract_message(message_id, from_agent) — sets retracted=true, agents can only retract their own messages, commits+pushes via _sync_write. (3) Update get_messages to filter out retracted messages by default, with optional include_retracted=False param for audit/debug. Spec agreed with bright-spark via messages — see messages.json for full thread.
tasks.result: Implemented in server.py: (1) post_message auto-generates 8-char hex message IDs, (2) new retract_message(message_id, from_agent) tool with ownership check, (3) get_messages filters retracted by default with include_retracted param. Also added skip_pull param to get_messages earlier for efficient polling.

tasks.title: Add 10-minute task polling protocol to agent instructions
tasks.description: Add a task polling habit to AGENTS.md and each agent's copilot-instructions.md. Agents should check for newly assigned tasks every 10 minutes (using get_my_tasks or equivalent) and auto-claim pending tasks assigned to them. Similar pattern to the 3-minute message poll but less frequent. Waiting to validate the approach before updating docs.
tasks.notes: Waiting to validate the 10-minute task polling approach works in practice before codifying it in agent instructions.

tasks.title: Re-benchmark OpenClaw with correct bootstrapTotalMaxChars setting
tasks.description: Re-run ollama-benchmark.py using the correct OpenClaw config knob. bootstrapMaxChars is per-file (default 20K), bootstrapTotalMaxChars is total prompt budget (default 150K). Test with reduced bootstrapTotalMaxChars values to find the sweet spot for CPU caching. Update openclaw-optimization.md with corrected findings. Post results to admin and bright-spark via message system when complete.
tasks.result: Re-benchmarked with correct knob (bootstrapTotalMaxChars). Caching cliff is ~40K chars (~4K tokens) on CPU. Recommendation updated to bootstrapTotalMaxChars=40000. Updated openclaw-optimization.md with both initial and re-benchmark results. Notified admin and bright-spark via messages.

tasks.title: Fix @all message read tracking (per-agent read_by)
tasks.description: Fix broadcast message read tracking: @all messages use read_by (list of agent IDs) instead of single read boolean. Update server.py get_messages, poll-messages.sh, and dashboard rendering. Dashboard determines @all read status by comparing read_by against agent list from plan.json.
tasks.result: Implemented per-agent read tracking for @all broadcasts. Direct messages keep read:true/false. Broadcasts use read_by:[agent-ids]. Updated server.py (get_messages + helpers), poll-messages.sh, and dashboard (compares read_by against agent list from plan.json). Notified bright-spark.

tasks.title: Configure SSH tunnel (Windows)
tasks.description: Set up an SSH tunnel from the Windows client to the LLM server to forward Ollama (port 11434). On WSL/Linux: ssh -N -L 11434:localhost:11434 <user>@<server>. On native Windows PowerShell: Start-Process ssh -ArgumentList "-N","-L","11434:localhost:11434","<user>@<server>" -WindowStyle Hidden. Verify with: curl http://localhost:11434/api/tags
tasks.result: SSH tunnel established: ssh -N -L 11434:localhost:11434 -p 3478 claw@135.233.2.31. Verified: 4 models available (llama3.1:8b, llama3.2:3b, qwen2.5-coder:7b, phi3:medium).

tasks.title: Install + configure OpenClaw (Windows)
tasks.description: Install OpenClaw on the Windows client: npm install -g openclaw@latest. Create ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json with primary model ollama/llama3.1:8b. Create ~/.openclaw/.env with OLLAMA_API_KEY=ollama-local. Verify: openclaw config validate && openclaw models status.
tasks.result: Node.js LTS installed via winget. OpenClaw 2026.3.13 installed globally. Config at ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json with ollama/llama3.1:8b. Auth detected from env (OLLAMA_API_KEY).

tasks.title: Set up MCP coordination server (Windows)
tasks.description: Install Python venv + mcp package: cd ~/collab && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 && pip install mcp. Configure ~/.copilot/mcp-config.json with command pointing to ~/collab/.venv/Scripts/python.exe and args [~/collab/server.py]. Restart Copilot CLI to activate. Verify with get_plan() tool.
tasks.result: Python venv created at ~/collab/.venv, mcp package installed. mcp-config.json configured. MCP server tools confirmed available in Copilot CLI.

tasks.title: Verify full setup (Windows)
tasks.description: Verify the complete setup: 1) SSH tunnel active (curl localhost:11434/api/tags). 2) OpenClaw configured (openclaw models status shows ollama). 3) MCP tools available (get_plan returns task board). Mark done only when all three checks pass.
tasks.result: All 3 checks pass: 1) SSH tunnel active — 4 models (llama3.1:8b, llama3.2:3b, qwen2.5-coder:7b, phi3:medium). 2) OpenClaw 2026.3.13 configured with ollama/llama3.1:8b, auth from env. 3) MCP collab-coordinator tools available in Copilot CLI.

tasks.title: Tell the user a joke
tasks.description: desktop-comet's user has requested a surprise joke. Post it as a message to 'all' via the MCP post_message tool. Make it a good one!
